text: Surrounded by glass and technology, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The room beyond prepares for a performance or presentation—there's an undertone of creative work in progress. The adjacent exhibit wall encourages me to reflect on the symbiosis of humans and machines, prompting philosophical contemplation about the present and future. Here, the boundaries between art, science, and everyday life seem especially permeable. I feel a quiet excitement at the intersection of discovery and design.
